meta.title: Software that runs itself
meta.description: Autofract is a studio building antifragile AI systems — for your inbox, your infrastructure, your habits. Software that heals, learns, and grows stronger with use.

hero.sub: Autofract builds antifragile AI systems — for your inbox, your infrastructure, your habits.

manifesto.body: Most software is a dashboard. It waits for you, stares at you, asks you to configure it. We build the opposite: systems that heal themselves, learn from failure, and grow stronger with every use. Antifragile by design, with a character that stays.

pathcore.label: PathCore
pathcore.headline: Antifragile infrastructure.
pathcore.body: PathCore is a self-healing microservices platform with cognitive AI workers, chaos engineering, and real-time system visualization through MindView. Hexagonal architecture with strict layer separation: Core, Uncore, Un-uncore. Systems that get stronger every time they break.

bashka.label: Bashka
bashka.headline: Your inbox, answered.
bashka.body: Bashka replies to your clients in Telegram while you work. It learns your voice, knows your services, quotes your prices, and hands you the deal done. Solo founders, freelancers, and small teams use Bashka for 24/7 client response without hiring a human.

videolinker.label: VideoLinker
videolinker.headline: Video that renders itself.
videolinker.body: VideoLinker is an AI-orchestrated video production platform. 64 services, 12 workers, 11 MCP tool servers. Script in, finished episode out — image-gen, video-gen, TTS, captions, QA scoring against 52 rules, FFmpeg composition. One API call, broadcast-quality video.

link19.label: Link19
link19.headline: Links, through Telegram.
link19.body: Link19 is a Telegram-first URL shortener with real-time analytics, phishing protection, and smart routing. Create and manage short links from a bot. Security scans via PhishTank, URLhaus, Google Safe Browsing. Smart links with A/B testing, geo-routing, device targeting.

oyka.label: Oyka
oyka.headline: A pet that grows with your habits.
oyka.body: Oyka is a sleepy little creature who cares whether you drank water today. Check in on your habits, and it grows, dresses up, and remembers your streak. Miss a day — it's fine. Miss two — it notices.

studio.headline: A studio of one, for now.
studio.p1: Autofract is a one-person studio. Five live products share a single engineering voice: antifragile infrastructure, an AI for your clients, a video production engine, a Telegram-first link shortener, and a companion for your habits.
studio.p2: Not VC-funded, not hiring. We build slowly, on purpose, for the long run.
